project.title: Wasteland Survivors
project.description: Post-apocalyptic survival game set in ruined cities overtaken by mutated wildlife.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, muted desaturated palette with rust and toxic green accents, thick readable silhouettes

assets.name: scavenger_scout
assets.description: human scavenger scout in patched hazmat hood, gas mask with cracked visor, torn cloak, holding a pipe wrench

assets.name: mutant_boar
assets.description: mutated war boar with armored skull plate, glowing green tusks, rusted chain collar, scarred hide

assets.name: drone_wasp
assets.description: salvaged combat drone shaped like a wasp, rusted metal wings, single red sensor eye, exposed wiring

assets.name: raider_brute
assets.description: heavily built human raider brute, scrap metal shoulder pads, spiked baseball bat, bandaged arms, mohawk

assets.name: feral_hound
assets.description: feral cyberhound with missing fur patches, metal jaw implant, toxic green collar light, lean aggressive posture
